zh.Warwick, Warwickshire, England: 英國瓦維其可爾沃里克
zh.Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom: 英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾

zh.Lutterworth, Leicestershire, England: 英國萊希斯特斯爾盧特沃斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William de Fielding於1448年出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾盧特沃斯時，他的父親John Fielding53歲，母親Joan Prudhome78歲。他於1449年與Agnes De St Liz Aka Fielding在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1471年5月4日在英國格盧斯特斯爾享年23歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William de Fielding于1448年出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾盧特沃斯时，他的父亲John Fielding53岁，母亲Joan Prudhome78岁。他于1449年与Agnes De St Liz Aka Fielding在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1471年5月4日在英国格盧斯特斯爾享年23岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Fielding
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occasionally from a Middle English survival of Old English felding ‘dweller in the field(s), open country’.
Irish: possibly a variant of McField (see McPhail ).

variants.name: Fielden
meanings: English: from a Middle English survival of the dative plural of Old English feld, denoting someone who lived ‘in the fields’. The lost district name Feldon in Warwickshire may be named with this word. Perhaps also a habitational name from Feldom in Marske, North Yorkshire, recorded as Feldon in 1231. See Field .

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: ‘light; beauty; prosperity’, also ‘rank, power, royal majesty’, a byname of the goddesses Lakshmi and Saraswati. Also widely used as an honorific title.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William de Fielding was born in 1448, in Lutterworth, Leicestershire, England, his father, John Fielding, was 53 and his mother, Joan Prudhome, was 78. He married Agnes De St Liz Aka Fielding in 1449, in Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 4 May 1471, in Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 23.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William de Fielding est né en 1448, à Lutterworth, Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, John Fielding, avait 53 ans et sa mère, Joan Prudhome, avait 78 ans. Il a épousé Agnes De St Liz Aka Fielding en 1449, à Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 4 mai 1471, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 23 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William de Fielding 1448 in Lutterworth, Leicestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Fielding 53 und seine Mutter Joan Prudhome 78. Er hat 1449 in Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom Agnes De St Liz Aka Fielding geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 4. Mai 1471 im Alter von 23 Jahren in Gloucestershire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William de Fielding è nato il nel 1448 nel Lutterworth, Leicestershire, England, il suo padre, John Fielding, aveva 53 anni e il suo madre, Joan Prudhome, aveva 78 anni. Lui sposato Agnes De St Liz Aka Fielding nel 1449, nel Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 4 maggio 1471, nel Gloucestershire, England, all'età di 23 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William de Fieldingが1448年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアルッテルウオルスで生まれた時，父John Fieldingは53歳，母Joan Prudhomeは78歳であった。1449年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアでAgnes De St Liz Aka Fieldingと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1471年5月4日にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアで23歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William de Fielding(이)가 1448년 영국 레이스스터실르 루터워스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Fielding(은)는 53세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Prudhome(은)는 78세였다. 그는 1449년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르에서 Agnes De St Liz Aka Fielding(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1471년 5월 4일 영국 그루스스터실르에서 23세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William de Fielding nasceu em 1448, em Lutterworth, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Fielding, tinha 53 anos e sua mãe, Joan Prudhome, tinha 78 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes De St Liz Aka Fielding em 1449, em Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 4 de maio de 1471, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, com 23 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William de Fielding родился в 1448 г. в местности луттирворт, лисестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Fielding было 53 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Prudhome, 78. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes De St Liz Aka Fielding в 1449 г. в местности лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 4 мая 1471 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 23 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William de Fielding nació en 1448, en Lutterworth, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Fielding, tenía 53 años y su mamá, Joan Prudhome, tenía 78 años. Se casó con Agnes De St Liz Aka Fielding en 1449, en Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 4 de mayo de 1471, en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 23 años.
